summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Travelioo Phase A Enterprise Grade features. All 23 backend tests pass (100%). E2E booking flow verified with Celtiis Cash payment. Shadow profiles, dynamic pricing, payment driver routing, OCR rebound, and force-fail all working correctly.
passed_tests: GET /api/health - Returns healthy with version 7.1
GET /api/health - Contains payment_operators with modes
GET /api/health - Contains environment_modes (duffel, mtn_momo, moov_money, stripe)
Shadow Profile - New user consent flow creates shadow profile in MongoDB
Shadow Profile - consent_granted=True and consent_at timestamp recorded
Manual Enrollment - Full flow: firstName → lastName → passport → confirm
Manual Enrollment - Passenger saved with ID in session
Dynamic Pricing - < 200 EUR = 10 EUR flat fee
Dynamic Pricing - 200-500 EUR = 8% fee
Dynamic Pricing - > 500 EUR = 6% fee
Dynamic Pricing - Boundary test at 200 EUR correct
Payment Routing - BJ gets [celtiis_cash, mtn_momo, moov_money]
Payment Routing - SN gets [mtn_momo, moov_money] (no celtiis)
Payment Routing - FR gets [stripe]
Payment Menu - BJ shows Celtiis Cash first
Celtiis Driver - Mode is MOCK
Celtiis Driver - initiate_payment returns PENDING in MOCK
Celtiis Driver - check_payment_status returns SUCCESSFUL in MOCK
Full Booking Flow - Destination → Date → Flight → Payment menu shows Celtiis first
Force-Fail - POST /api/test/force_fail enables fail mode
Force-Fail - Payment polling detects failure, booking status = payment_failed
OCR Rebound - correcting_ocr state accepts comma-separated corrections
OCR Rebound - Corrections applied to enrollment_data
Shadow Profile - travel_history updated after successful payment
Shadow Profile - payment_methods updated with celtiis_cash after payment
critical_code_review_comments: Shadow Profile service correctly creates profiles on consent with AES-256 encryption support
Payment driver routing correctly prioritizes Celtiis Cash for BJ (Benin)
Celtiis Cash driver in MOCK mode returns simulated success
OCR Rebound correction flow properly handles comma-separated field corrections
Force-fail test mode correctly triggers payment_failed status
All payment drivers (Celtiis, MTN MoMo, Moov, Stripe) are in MOCK mode as expected

mocked_apis.note: All payment drivers are in MOCK mode as specified in requirements
mocked_list: Duffel GDS - SANDBOX mode (real sandbox flights)
WhatsApp Cloud API - Token invalid (messages logged only)

test_credentials: No auth required. Use POST /api/test/simulate with {phone, message}. API Base URL: https://voice-travel-booking.preview.emergentagent.com. Webhook verify token: travelioo_verify_2024
seed_data_creation: Tests use unique phone numbers with timestamps (+22990PHASETEST*, +22990E2E*, +22990SHADOW*, +22990FAIL*, +22990OCR*) for clean sessions.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase A Enterprise Grade testing complete (Iteration 10). All features verified: (1) Shadow Profiles created on consent with travel_history and payment_methods updated after booking, (2) Dynamic Pricing tiers: <200EUR=10EUR flat, 200-500EUR=8%, >500EUR=6%, (3) Payment driver routing: BJ→[celtiis_cash, mtn_momo, moov_money], SN→[mtn_momo, moov_money], FR→[stripe], (4) Celtiis Cash driver in MOCK mode returns simulated success, (5) OCR Rebound correction flow accepts comma-separated values for missing fields, (6) Force-fail test mode triggers payment_failed status. Full E2E booking flow tested: consent→enrollment→destination→flight→payment→confirmed. WhatsApp token is invalid (expected - use /api/test/simulate for all testing).
